---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation?

## Proposed solution
How should it work? Be specific about the interface and behavior.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you think of?

## Which law does this relate to?
- [ ] Law 1: Research Before Executing
- [ ] Law 2: Plan Is Sacred
- [ ] Law 3: One Thing at a Time
- [ ] Law 4: Verify Before Reporting
- [ ] Law 5: Reflect After Sessions
- [ ] Law 6: Iterate One Change
- [ ] Law 7: Learn From Every Session
- [ ] Mulahazah (instinct system)
- [ ] Infrastructure (installer, MCP, hooks)
